title: thylax fraxineum
intro: Thylax fraxineum, also known as Fraxinus excelsior, is a deciduous tree species native to Europe and western Asia, classified under the family Oleaceae. The bark of Thylax fraxineum contains medicinal properties, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Thylax fraxineum include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help lower cholesterol levels, improve heart health, and reduce the risk of certain diseases. Herbal preparations of Thylax fraxineum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote cardiovascular health, reduce stress, and support immune function.
